# balena_image_env_var (Resource)

Manages an image-level environment variable.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Variable name.
- `release_image_id` (Number) ID of the release image (`image__is_part_of__release`).
- `value` (String, Sensitive) Variable value.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Numeric identifier.
